basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Gynecology Consultant & Embryologist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Gynecology Consultant (IVF) & Embryologist Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 16-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India rules for SC/ST, OBC, Women, and PwBD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with specialization in Gynecology and Obstetrics and experience in ART clinic, or Post-graduate in clinical embryology with experience in human gametes and embryos.
qualification.details: Gynecology Consultant (IVF): MBBS with specialization in Gynecology and Obstetrics and experience in ART clinic, or Post-graduate in clinical embryology with experience in human gametes and embryos. Embryologist: MBBS with specialization in Gynecology and Obstetrics and experience in ART clinic, or Post-graduate in clinical embryology with experience in human gametes and embryos.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 1,42,506/- per month (consolidated) for Gynecology Consultant (IVF) and Rs. 56,640/- per month (consolidated) for Embryologist.
salary_details.details: Gynecology Consultant (IVF): Rs. 1,42,506/- per month (consolidated) Embryologist: Rs. 56,640/- per month (consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bhopal recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Bhopal recruitment is 16-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Gynecology Consultant (IVF) & Embryologist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Gynecology Consultant (IVF) and Embryologist positions at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Gynecology Consultant (IVF) post?
faq.answer: For the Gynecology Consultant (IVF) post, candidates need an MBBS with specialization in Gynecology and Obstetrics and experience in an ART clinic, or a Post-graduate in clinical embryology with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all advertised posts is 50 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the AIIMS Bhopal recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1,000/- for EWS/General/OBC categories. However, PwBD/SC/ST and women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Embryologist position?
faq.answer: The Embryologist position offers a consolidated salary of Rs. 56,640/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions at AIIMS Bhopal will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply by sending their filled application form via email to the designated recruitment email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested photocopies of identity proof, date of birth proof, mark sheets, degrees, experience certificates, and other relevant documents along with the application.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC, Women, and PwBD candidates as per the Government of India rules.
